courses.name: Branson Hills Golf Club
courses.desc: #1 Public in MO (Golfpass 2026). Ranked #10 Public in the U.S.! Dramatic 130-ft elevation changes. Missouri golf history museum.
courses.funFact: The first tee drops 130+ ft — that's a 13-story building!

courses.name: Payne's Valley — Big Cedar
courses.desc: #1 USA TODAY 2026! Tiger's first public design. Bonus 19th island green.

courses.name: Ozarks National — Big Cedar
courses.desc: Stunning design by Coore & Crenshaw. Consistently ranked in national top 100.

courses.name: Buffalo Ridge Springs
courses.desc: Tom Fazio masterpiece at Big Cedar. Ranked among America's top public courses.

courses.name: Ledgestone Country Club
courses.desc: Award-winning mountain golf just 5 min from the condo! Great value and stunning views.

courses.name: Top of the Rock — Big Cedar
courses.desc: Tom Watson par-3 course with stunning views. Also features the Lost Canyon Cave tour.

courses.name: Cliffhangers at Big Cedar
courses.desc: Jack Nicklaus par-3 course. Dramatic elevation changes and stunning Ozark views.

courses.name: Thousand Hills Golf Resort
courses.desc: Resort course in the heart of Branson. Affordable and fun for all skill levels.

courses.name: Holiday Hills Golf Club
courses.desc: Public course with great rates. Relaxed, friendly atmosphere.

courses.name: Mountain Top — Big Cedar
courses.desc: Walking-only 13-hole course. Pure golf experience — no carts, just you and the game.

tip: Weekday tee times save $50-100+. Book 30 days ahead for Big Cedar courses.
